programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: The chefs are challenged to a taco throwdown for the taco king, actor and restaurateur Danny Trejo. For the Quickfire, the only sharp tool they can use is a machete, in honor of one of Danny’s signature characters.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: It’s Restaurant Wars and this season Padma takes all the limitations off the table as the chefs can make as much food as they want and shop wherever they choose. The two winning chefs from last week’s concept challenge are given 48 hours to pick their teams and make the restaurants they pitched come to life.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Jack Black is Po, the unlikely hero chosen to fulfill an ancient kung fu prophecy in this delightful animation voiced by a star-studded cast.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po’s new life as The Dragon Warrior is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain determined to conquer China and destroy Kung Fu.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: Superman returns after five years in space to find Lois engaged and Lex Luthor with a sinister plan that will endanger America.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2
programme.desc: Van Kleiss is back, and with new EVO-creating nanite powers - powers that are quickly turned on Rex's best friend Noah.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2
programme.desc: Rex and Six travel deep beneath the ocean to recover a dangerous piece of technology.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2
programme.desc: Rex is partnered with a green Providence agent to investigate a remote, underground party where EVOs and humans mix.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2
programme.desc: While bringing up the rear of a Providence caravan, Rex and Noah take a wrong turn and find themselves the targets of an outlaw gang.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2
programme.desc: The shield containing the Bug Jar is failing, so Rex and Bobo are sent in to fix it.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2
programme.desc: Rex discovers his chimp sidekick is in fact a robot -- put there by the real Bobo so he can have some time off.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2
programme.desc: Rex is kidnapped by a stranger with an unbelievable story, and learns more about his past. His brother, Caesar has returned.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2
programme.desc: Agent Six recruits Rex to cure an old friend who has turned EVO.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2
programme.desc: A vigilante group has been freeing EVOS from captivity. When Rex is sent to investigate, he discovers things work differently in the jungle.

programme.title: Generator Rex S2
programme.desc: To help Noah get closer to a girl, Rex constructs an elaborate haunted house with the hope of scaring her into his friend's arms.

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: The chefs are joined at the hip when they must share the infamous “double apron” with a teammate and whip up a pie for members of the hit a Capella group, Pentatonix. For the Elimination Challenge, the chefs team up again to create a hot & cold dish for some of the best chefs in Los Angeles. However, the chefs will have to be mindful of their food scraps as they’ll be judged not just on the dishes, but on how much food they waste. As if that wasn’t enough, a looming double elimination threatens to cut the close-knit group of chefs down even more!

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: In the most anticipated challenge of Top Chef, the chefs form two teams to plan and execute an entire restaurant concept in only 24 hours! From designing the décor to establishing a menu, the chefs have their hands full. Meanwhile, two very different personalities emerge as the executive chefs for each restaurant: Will the more trusting, collaborative chef lead their team to victory? Or will the demanding visionary help bring their restaurant the win?

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S2
programme.desc: The chefs have tough decisions to make when a massive conveyor belt starts up in the kitchen and they must strategically choose their ingredients for a 5-star Quickfire dish. Later that night, the dining room takes on an eerie feeling as a few newly awakened zombies join Vanessa Lachey & Curtis Stone in the kitchen for an Elimination Challenge that sends chills down everyone’s spine! The Chefs must use (not eat!) their brains and be as creative as possible…because unlike zombies, there’s no coming back for the eliminated chef!

programme.title: Hollywood On Set S1
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.title: Lego Jurassic Park: The Unofficial Retelling
programme.desc: The ever charming and now slightly older Chaos Mathematician Dr. Ian Malcolm retells the tale of what happened that dreadful night at Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Jack Black is Po, the unlikely hero chosen to fulfill an ancient kung fu prophecy in this delightful animation voiced by a star-studded cast.

programme.title: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S1
programme.desc: Robert Townsend and Denzel Washington lend their voices to this Caribbean-style version of the tale about a strange little man who can spin straw into gold.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Rodney is having more trouble with Cousin Eddie and seeks advice from Grandpa Squirrel.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2
programme.desc: Stan the exterminator is back and he mistakes Leon for the Giant Wall Rat of Sumatra.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: To make money to buy a new toy, Andy and Rodney set up a cart to sell sandwiches.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: When Andy's toy rocket gets stuck in the top of the tallest tree in the park, Rodney dusts off his long-dormant tree-climbing skills to retrieve it.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney shows off his haggling expertise at the flea market, but before long he's given away all of Andy's money.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney and Mr. J both want to help Andy win the melon-crate derby, but they want it so much that they forget to include him when they build their carts.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: While on a camping trip with the Badger Scouts, Andy makes a fun new enemy--the annoying Kyle Finkster!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: The other pets in the pet parade can do lots of cool, exciting tricks, which makes Rodney look bad.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: After Rodney is accidentally left behind while the Johnson's are on vacation, he goes to bunk with Leon in the wild.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney and Mr. J become managers of rival baseball teams, but neither will let Andy play.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney have a falling out and hold auditions to find new best friends.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney compete to be the faces of Furlock, a new pet hair gel from international hair icon and fancypants, Manzio.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Andy and Rodney are determined to stay up all night in order to see the legendary Yellow Flash in the sky.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Building a pool in the backyard would wreck Leon's tree, which is the last thing Rodney wants.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: An accident strands Rodney on a deserted island. Except it's the kind of 'island' you find in the street.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: The night before he's to give an important speech, Mr. J loses his voice while laughing too hard at a silly singing cow movie that Rodney insisted he watch.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Andy tries to bridge the gap between Rodney and his father through the timeless art of karaoke.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney's attempt to fix the air conditioner goes terribly wrong, leaving him trapped in the walls of the house.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney's special time at the circus with Darlene is ruined by the arrival of Rodney's Cousin Eddie.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Andy is practically blind after losing his glasses, but all his other senses suddenly start working much better.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: When a cereal box provides the location of buried treasure, Andy and Rodney must make peace with their arch-enemies Kyle and Salty Mike to dig it up.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney enlists Leon and Darlene to join The Rod Squad, whose heroic mission is to prevent Andy from getting in trouble with Mrs. J. After donning ridiculous outfits and infiltrating a sticky bun warehouse, things start to get very silly.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Rodney really is the perfect pet... until the arrival of Archie, a rabbit who REALLY is the perfect pet.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: Much to his delight, Rodney learns he is an endangered species, whose every whim must be catered to. Much to his chagrin, Mr. J learns Rodney is an endangered species, whose every whim must be catered to.

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S1
programme.desc: It's Andy's birthday, and wouldn't you know it, what with all the lounging and the resting and the napping, Rodney totally forgot!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Po’s new life as The Dragon Warrior is threatened by the emergence of a formidable villain determined to conquer China and destroy Kung Fu.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: The chefs head to the mountains, a few hours outside of Los Angeles to go to Summer Camp where they are challenged to an outdoor grilling Quickfire for Padma and “Top Chef” Kentucky winner Kelsey Barnard Clark. Before the sun rises, the chefs get to work on an upscale brunch buffet for 200 moms vacationing at the camp using a very limited stock pantry. It’ll take more than s’mores and a round of kumbayas to impress the moms, the judges Tom, Padma and Gail, and guest judge “Top Chef” Charleston Winner Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: One Win

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: To stop the crime wave that has been hitting Arcadia, the Trollhunters must search for a missing Troll.

programme.desc: When Hookfang is drawn to a female Monstrous Nightmare, Snotlout tries to break them up before he loses his friend forever.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: After Dagur attacks Berk, Astrid trauns a crew of back-up Dragon riders to battle back, although no one anticipates how soon the strike will come.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Missing his old life on his birthday, Boss tries to have a full-fledged grown-up celebration in Chicago, but Carol is the only one able to chauffeur and take care of him. The two battle at every stop of the birthday party tour, but when Boss's old work nemesis sets him up for an Federal Investigation Sting at an improv comedy show, Boss and Carol are forced to work together to escape the law.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss, Tina, JJ, Dez and Pip willfully get babysat by the Uncuddleables, planning to expose them as horrible sitters via secret, hidden cameras. But the plan is thrown for a loop when Tina's first night alone without her parents makes her fall for their sitter Mia as a "substitute mommy." Meanwhile, Nannycam uses the babysitting distraction to sneak into the Uncuddleables' secret garage hideout to gather intel with her own "B field team."

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and the team have one last attempt to get the pendant, but they will have to disrupt Jayesh's wedding, and contend with his guards, to do so. At the mage island, Klaus and Veruca get hold of the Tianshang helmet.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Mr. Ping is possessed by the ghost of Master Mastodon, the ancient master sworn to protect the Tianshang storm wheels. After a ghostly sewer chase, Mastodon agrees to help our team to stop Klaus and Veruca. He reveals that their next step is to go across the sea to Central America.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now broken out of mind control, Layla goes undercover with the gang, hiding the fact that she’s no longer being controlled. The crew is shocked to discover that revered martyr Rafaela Moreno is still alive and is the mastermind behind the mind control plot. Rafaela puts Layla’s driving to the test in a wild race against a mystery driver, then takes the rest of the crew hostage just days before Rafaela's dastardly plot.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now in Rafaela’s custody, the crew works together to break Echo out to retrieve the hauler. Echo makes it into the jungle and must battle a mind-controlled Ms. Nowhere using everything she’s learned about spying and survival from the very woman who's out to get her. Meanwhile, Rafaela enlists Frostee to help her develop a non-exploding version of the mind control formula before her plan goes into motion at the favela race.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.desc: Boss scours Chicago to find his old co-worker nemesis Board Member Bradley, his key to cutting a deal with the Federal Agents for his freedom. Meanwhile, Tina is trapped at home with her paranoid grandma Yaya, forced to prove to her that she’s not a criminal baby like the news is causing Yaya to believe.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: The Templeton’s hometown is overtaken by baby criminals, with Temp Baby Aubrey in charge. Boss has 48 hours to somehow restore them all to adulthood and turn them in, or face jail time himself. With Tina now acting like a dark angel of vengeance after feeling betrayed by Aubrey, Boss is forced to assemble a team from unlikely odd friends. Together, they launch a final mission to settle old scores and clear Boss Baby’s name.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: A space explorer, previously thought lost in space, returns to Earth and joins four teenagers in a search for a giant alien robot lion

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Aardvark didn't have a sticky tongue. He had a long nose, big clumsy paws and he found it very difficult to eat. Then one day Aardvark's tongue got stuck in the honey log! All his friends pulled and pulled until KERPLING! Aardvark's tongue finally came unstuck. From that day on Aardvark's tongue was all long and sticky - perfect for eating yummy termites. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Whale didn't spout. Then one day there is a big storm in Tinga Tinga. The winds blew stronger and the ocean waves got bigger and bigger. Suddenly an enormous wave picks up Whale and carries her all the way from the ocean to the Waterhole. SPLOSH! But Whale was so full of water that she couldn't move! How do the animals help Whale get back to the ocean? For once, Elephant has the answer. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris is feeling ill so Marsha sends him to bed until he is better. Big Chris enjoys the attention rather too much and fails to let everyone know when he is on the mend.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Marsha overhears the others saying she is too bossy. She decides that Silver hatch would be a better place without her. Chaos swiftly ensues, can Marsha be persuaded to stay, they can't cope without her!

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Every spring in Norway, whales use a clever hunting technique called “bubble feeding” to catch quantities of herring. When they spot a shoal of herring, they begin to encircle the herring, periodically releasing streams of bubbles that form a curtain of air, surrounding the fish.

programme.title: Sea Hunters

programme.title: Sea Hunters

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Cape Gannets are tough hunters flying over the coasts for their favorite prey: shoals of sardines, waiting for a surprising ally: dolphins.

programme.title: Sea Hunters

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: In the heart of the Valdees Peninsula, in Patagonia, whales are regularly hunted by a predator whose diminutive size hides its gruesome intentions: the seagull, forcing whales to dive deep into the depths, away from essential oxygen and light.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, Mike Davidson is on streets, in tunnels, on tracks and in trolley restoration garages - working shoulder-to-shoulder with the team that keeps one of America's largest and oldest mass transit systems running smoothly and on time.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: From heiress of a giant media empire to wanted felon, witness the strange saga of the Patty Hearst kidnapping of 1974.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson goes on a cross-country road trip to help the Well Done Foundation. They work to find and cap some of the estimated two million leaking, toxic - potentially deadly abandoned oil and gas wells that are scattered throughout the U.S.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson embeds with the team of one of the most extreme, avalanche-prone mountain ski mountains in the world - Snowbird. They battle to keep the steep and deep slopes safe with shovels, snowcats and even a WWII Howitzer cannon.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: Mike Davidson goes to the biggest automated package sorting facility in the world - UPS Worldport in Louisville, Kentucky. Two million packages go through here every day, and it's up to the hardhat heroes behind the scenes to make it all happen.

programme.title: Aerial Africa

programme.title: Aerial Africa

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: To stop the crime wave that has been hitting Arcadia, the Trollhunters must search for a missing Troll.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Hookfang is drawn to a female Monstrous Nightmare, Snotlout tries to break them up before he loses his friend forever.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: After Dagur attacks Berk, Astrid trauns a crew of back-up Dragon riders to battle back, although no one anticipates how soon the strike will come.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Stormfly is captured by a new enemy, Ryker Grimborn, and the Dragon Hunters, Hiccup, Toothless and the team must rescue her before it's too late

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Missing his old life on his birthday, Boss tries to have a full-fledged grown-up celebration in Chicago, but Carol is the only one able to chauffeur and take care of him. The two battle at every stop of the birthday party tour, but when Boss's old work nemesis sets him up for an Federal Investigation Sting at an improv comedy show, Boss and Carol are forced to work together to escape the law.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss, Tina, JJ, Dez and Pip willfully get babysat by the Uncuddleables, planning to expose them as horrible sitters via secret, hidden cameras. But the plan is thrown for a loop when Tina's first night alone without her parents makes her fall for their sitter Mia as a "substitute mommy." Meanwhile, Nannycam uses the babysitting distraction to sneak into the Uncuddleables' secret garage hideout to gather intel with her own "B field team."

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and the team have one last attempt to get the pendant, but they will have to disrupt Jayesh's wedding, and contend with his guards, to do so. At the mage island, Klaus and Veruca get hold of the Tianshang helmet.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Mr. Ping is possessed by the ghost of Master Mastodon, the ancient master sworn to protect the Tianshang storm wheels. After a ghostly sewer chase, Mastodon agrees to help our team to stop Klaus and Veruca. He reveals that their next step is to go across the sea to Central America.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now broken out of mind control, Layla goes undercover with the gang, hiding the fact that she’s no longer being controlled. The crew is shocked to discover that revered martyr Rafaela Moreno is still alive and is the mastermind behind the mind control plot. Rafaela puts Layla’s driving to the test in a wild race against a mystery driver, then takes the rest of the crew hostage just days before Rafaela's dastardly plot.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now in Rafaela’s custody, the crew works together to break Echo out to retrieve the hauler. Echo makes it into the jungle and must battle a mind-controlled Ms. Nowhere using everything she’s learned about spying and survival from the very woman who's out to get her. Meanwhile, Rafaela enlists Frostee to help her develop a non-exploding version of the mind control formula before her plan goes into motion at the favela race.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Lucky and her friends try to prevent Aunt Cora from leaving Miradero.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Bootsy's plan of 6 strategically placed kittens brings the whole town down, Mega Fat is forced to team with Boss Baby

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: Clover wants to follow in her Grandma Rose's footsteps and compete at the dangerous Tournament of Doom, but King Julien forbids her to attend.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Eep has the first-ever sleepover, scary noises and shadows send the girls screaming out of the cave; Thunk saves the day when Bear Owls invade.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: The kids meet an unlikely ally when trying to find Po

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: Toby's ninja brother Brandt returns to San Lorenzo, and Puss agrees to help him reunite with his brothers – to get them out of town.

programme.desc: Lucky and her friends try to prevent Aunt Cora from leaving Miradero.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: When Bootsy's plan of 6 strategically placed kittens brings the whole town down, Mega Fat is forced to team with Boss Baby

programme.desc: Clover wants to follow in her Grandma Rose's footsteps and compete at the dangerous Tournament of Doom, but King Julien forbids her to attend.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Eep has the first-ever sleepover, scary noises and shadows send the girls screaming out of the cave; Thunk saves the day when Bear Owls invade.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws Of Destiny
programme.desc: The kids meet an unlikely ally when trying to find Po

programme.title: The Adventures Of Puss In Boots
programme.desc: Toby's ninja brother Brandt returns to San Lorenzo, and Puss agrees to help him reunite with his brothers – to get them out of town.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss scours Chicago to find his old co-worker nemesis Board Member Bradley, his key to cutting a deal with the Federal Agents for his freedom. However, he must lose the tail of Canada’s most notorious fugitive tracker, a trained bear cub named Henri. Meanwhile, Tina is trapped at home with her paranoid grandma Yaya, forced to prove to her that she’s not a criminal baby like the news is causing Yaya to believe.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: The Templeton’s hometown is overtaken by baby criminals, with Temp Baby Aubrey in charge. Boss has 48 hours to somehow restore them all to adulthood and turn them in, or face jail time himself. With Tina now acting like a dark angel of vengeance after feeling betrayed by Aubrey, Boss is forced to assemble a team from unlikely odd friends. Together, they launch a final mission to settle old scores and clear Boss Baby’s name.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: A space explorer, previously thought lost in space, returns to Earth and joins four teenagers in a search for a giant alien robot lion

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: The Blue Lion delivers the team to an alien planet where they discover a mysterious castle. Inside, they awaken an alien princess who sends them on a mission to find the remaining lions.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Spirit and Lucky desperately try to find a way back to one another.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Aardvark didn't have a sticky tongue. He had a long nose, big clumsy paws and he found it very difficult to eat. Then one day Aardvark's tongue got stuck in the honey log! All his friends pulled and pulled until KERPLING! Aardvark's tongue finally came unstuck. From that day on Aardvark's tongue was all long and sticky - perfect for eating yummy termites. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Whale didn't spout. Then one day there is a big storm in Tinga Tinga. The winds blew stronger and the ocean waves got bigger and bigger. Suddenly an enormous wave picks up Whale and carries her all the way from the ocean to the Waterhole. SPLOSH! But Whale was so full of water that she couldn't move! How do the animals help Whale get back to the ocean? For once, Elephant has the answer. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor has asked CiCi to perform one of her stunts in front of a big crowd. CiCi is very nervous and Roary does his best to help his friend prepare for the event.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris is feeling ill so Marsha sends him to bed until he is better. Big Chris enjoys the attention rather too much and fails to let everyone know when he is on the mend.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Marsha overhears the others saying she is too bossy. She decides that Silver hatch would be a better place without her. Chaos swiftly ensues, can Marsha be persuaded to stay, they can't cope without her!

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris is working on Loada while the others plan a surprise evening for him for being the longest serving member of Silver hatch

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: Big Chris receives a mysterious parcel… the cars are intrigued to find out what is in it. Strange and silly things start happening at the workshop, could it have anything to do with Big Chris' package?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car
programme.desc: PC Pete has been summonsed to get to the bottom of some missing fuel. But where's Nick? And who can solve the case?

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When one of Rikki’s plants won't sing, Pixie and Juniper both tell their varying recollections of why the plant is suddenly silent. / Kelp, Scallop, and Cruz have always thought that starfish did nothing but laze about; but as they go about their day, the starfish goes through his own routine, completely unbeknownst to everyone else.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Aggro is embarrassed about big changes she's going through. And when she gets stuck in a volcano, the Rescue Riders seek help from ... Magnus?

programme.title: Dinotrux
programme.desc: D-Structs loses his wrecking ball tail and wants to prove he's still dangerous, but when he gets stuck the crew must decide if they will save him.

programme.title: Dinotrux

programme.title: The Future of Nature 1
programme.desc: Documentary series looking at the impact of carbon on the Earth and how carbon levels can be can be reduced.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Trees 1
programme.desc: Even the mightiest oak must start life as a tiny acorn. We explore the secret lives of young trees, discovering how they magically transform from minute seeds into mature adults. But with fewer than one in a thousand seeds reaching adulthood, a tree's early years are the most treacherous of its life.

programme.title: Great Indian Railway Journeys 1
programme.desc: On an epic railway journey from Lucknow in Uttar Pradesh to Kolkata in West Bengal, Michael Portillo uses his Bradshaw's 1913 Handbook of Indian, Foreign and Colonial Travel, published when the British Raj was fifty-five years old, to chart a course through India's history from the days of The East India Company to the dawn of independence.

programme.title: The Travel Show: My Great Malaysian Railway Adventure 1
programme.desc: Francis Bourgeois travels to Asia for the first time to find out about Malaysia's railway network and meet up with fellow enthusiasts.

programme.title: World's Greatest Train Journeys: Japan's New Golden Route 1
programme.desc: Paul departs from Tokyo and travels northward by bullet train, pausing to soak in the serene mountain springs of Unazuki Onsen, explore the shimmering gold leaf of Kanazawa and meet the master craftsmen keeping Wajima's lacquerware traditions alive.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder S6
programme.desc: This riveting series takes viewers through the stunning twists and turns of real-life cases involving suspicious deaths. At the heart of each case is a pressing question: was the victim's demise the result of an accident, suicide, or possibly murder? Each hour-long episode traces the evolution of the investigation, from the discovery of the victim to the gathering of evidence to the efforts of detectives and family members determined to expose the truth, once and for all.

programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: RUTE:Toughness Redefined
programme.desc: The growing regional competition R U Tough Enough is searching for the toughest person from Southeast Asia. Join the search and meet some of the most mentally and physically strong individuals, leading up to an epic final showdown in Kuala Lumpur for the prize of US$15,000!

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: A former top team racing driver wants to prove himself in a race but accidentally hurts his teammate Lily, leading to the team’s downfall. When an inexperienced virtual car racing champion joins the team and unexpectedly shines in a real-life race, can the three drivers team up to regain glory for their team?

programme.title: A Good Deal
programme.desc: Kidnapped by a desperate couple, businessman Burks Hill is forced on a frantic journey to Los Angeles. As danger mounts, the three travellers discover that they each harbour deadly secrets. What began as a simple kidnapping spirals into a lethal game where no one's plan will survive.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: To save his son who has been kidnapped by human traffickers, police officer Zhang relentlessly hunts them down and accidentally finds himself implicated in a major child abduction case. In the process, he teams up with a mysterious lady to crack the international crime syndicate and rescue his son.

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: Buddy Valastro's Cake Dynasty
programme.desc: When Buddy is tasked with making a 20th-anniversary cake for the cast of the Broadway show Wicked, his team struggles to create a life-sized masterpiece in only three days.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece brings a Southern twist to a traditional recipe by adding bacon, lettuce, and tomato to the Dutch Baby "pancake", and serves it alongside a colourful asparagus and radish salad.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah combines the flavours of Morocco, Tunisia and Louisiana by making savoury cheddar cheese grits topped with "eggs in purgatory", a dish made with spicy tomato sauce, similar to shakshuka.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S1)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes Southern-style fried chicken Monte Cristo, served with a cranberry sauce. It's inspired by and similar to a croque monsieur, a delicious warm French ham and cheese sandwich.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something
programme.desc: Nam-gil and Sang-yoon arrive at the end of Korea, at the beautiful Mihwangsa Temple in Haenam, with a stunning view of the South Sea. They spend a day at the temple, with the head monk.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: For sea lovers Elizabeth and Ryan, any day spent on the water is wonderful. After experiencing a health scare, they realised it was opportune to pursue their passions full-time.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Always game to try new things, Theresa and Kiana attend a line-dancing class in Dallas. While there, Theresa conducts an impromptu group reading that leaves several cowboys in tears.

programme.title: Secret Love Triangle
programme.desc: After being falsely charged with murdering her best friend's husband, Jessica goes on the run with her husband. To prove her innocence, she must first untangle a deadly web of lust and deceit.

programme.title: My Father's Murder In Greece
programme.desc: When Allie's father George takes her on a trip to Greece to discover her familial roots, George soon ends up murdered. Now Allie must uncover long-kept family secrets to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend working aboard a yacht in the South Pacific. As her first voyage sets sail, she falls for entrepreneur Mark.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something
programme.desc: They meet the finest biker of Jiri Mountain, a poet who fled city life to live in the mountains. From this poet, who captures photos of stars and flowers, the two actors learn poetry.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Sean moved to the East Coast to be with Candace, but living in her bachelorette apartment is becoming cramped. They are searching for a seaside home that accommodates both of their needs.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt
programme.desc: Tania and Sundara moved to the East Coast for work and are now looking to find a permanent place to live and expand their family. They want a peaceful place near the ocean to relax and enjoy each other.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares her favourite Sicilian dish, pasta con le sarde, or sardine pasta, using both canned fish and fresh sardines atop long-cut pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Author and chef Sara Moulton joins Rachael in her Tuscan kitchen for a cooking challenge. Both Rachael and Sara create mystery meals using ingredients from Rachael's Tuscan pantry.

programme.title: Because This Is My First Twenty
programme.desc: So Hyun enjoys a day in Las Vegas. A short but fantastic limousine tour presents her with an unforgettable memory of Las Vegas.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Denise has a growth on her booty, but scarring from a previous trauma has kept her from getting it removed. Zachary is a drag artist whose touring career is dragged down by his debilitating psoriasis.

programme.title: Taken In Plain Sight
programme.desc: After months of investigation, Abby becomes convinced that she's found her daughter's abductor. With the authorities dismissing her as a grief-stricken mother, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Today, we'll explore a house where, if the perfect wooden furniture isn’t available, the couple takes matters into their own hands, creating their own pieces, making it feel like a cozy café.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something
programme.desc: Veterinarian-turned-priest Michael, who came to Jeju Island and fell in love with it, now tends to a vast ranch. Nam-gil and Sang-yoon assist Father Michael in caring for the horses.

programme.title: Buddy Valastro's Cake Dynasty
programme.desc: The Mother's Day rush is one of the busiest times of the year, and Buddy is stressed! He needs to create a custom cake for the 50th Anniversary of Secretariat's Triple Crown win.

programme.desc: Tune in to witness a curated showcase of iconic brand highlights, unforgettable collection reveals, and the most captivating celebrity fashion moments.

programme.title: Most Watched

programme.title: Fashion Junior
programme.desc: Follow kids fashion trends that will be huge in the recent and coming seasons, stay tuned for the best dressed celebs’ kids and runway highlights!

programme.title: Fashion Junior

programme.title: Top Models
programme.desc: Meet this season’s modeling stars and those who are on their way to international fashion stardom. Most in-demand girls from around the globe and their fascinating stories!

programme.title: Top Models
programme.desc: Meet this season’s modeling stars and those who are on their way to international fashion stardom. Most in-demand girls from around the globe and their fascinating stories!

programme.title: Bridal
programme.desc: Grab a clue on what's going on in the world of brides before you hit a salon! Enjoy a wide array of high fashion choices, undeniably romantic and decidedly feminine.

programme.title: Bridal
programme.desc: Grab a clue on what's going on in the world of brides before you hit a salon! Enjoy a wide array of high fashion choices, undeniably romantic and decidedly feminine.

programme.title: Fashion Films
programme.desc: Sit back, relax and enjoy a handful of experimental narrative fashion films with top models starring, it’s one of the most artistic ways to follow the latest collections!

programme.title: Fashion Films
programme.desc: Sit back, relax and enjoy a handful of experimental narrative fashion films with top models starring, it’s one of the most artistic ways to follow the latest collections!

programme.title: Fashion Teens
programme.desc: Explore the latest fashion trends for teens, the cutest outfits of the A-list celebrities, mix & match insights, and style tips for all occasions.

programme.title: Heroes of the East
programme.desc: A Chinese man marries a Japanese woman through an arranged marriage and manages to insult all of her Japanese martial arts family by issuing a challenge to her that is misinterpreted by the others. He must then prove how good Chinese Kung Fu really is through a series of duels with the seven Japanese martial artists who come to meet the challenge!

programme.title: The Wandering Swordsman
programme.desc: The wandering swordsman Yu Hsieh Erh has formidable sword skills and helps the poor by robbing from thieves and distributing the wealth. He meets a group of bandits who are planning to rob a convoy escorting some valuables and is tricked into participating in the robbery. Yu soon realizes his folly and returns to take revenge on the bandits.

programme.title: Monkey Kung Fu
programme.desc: Wei Chun is a cocky young man sentenced to jail for killing a man in a fight. One day, Wei Chun picks a fight with a seemingly defenseless old man who completely thrashes him! The old man turns out to be the master of monkey style kung fu and as they become friends, he gives Wei Chun half of a medallion that would direct him to hidden secrets.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...

programme.title: Demon of the Lute
programme.desc: Lute demon Chin Mo has reappeared in the world to wreak havoc. Hsiao Feng Ling is ordered to help find a special bow and arrows that can counter the demon. Only Chiao Yin knows the whereabouts of the weapon. Hsiao and her classmate Old Naughty set out on an arduous journey to find Chiao. After overcoming many obstacles, they catch Chin Mo's man trying to snatch the bow and manage to stop him in time....

programme.title: Let It Ghost
programme.desc: The movie consists of three urban ghost stories: when a film crew is haunted by a ghost, the director decides to cast her to play the ghost; when a taxi driver takes his girlfriend to a staycation, a horny ghost adds spice to it; a wandering child ghost refuses to leave a mall that is to be demolished, so the tenants help her to move on.

programme.title: New Tales of the Flying Fox
programme.desc: In a great rendition of The Silver Fox and Legend of the Fox comes this exciting adventure, where the only thing between the clan leaders and certain death is Hui Ying-hung.

programme.title: The Shaolin Avengers
programme.desc: Hu seeks to avenge his father who is being killed by the White-Browed Hermit and his gang. However, he fails in his attempt and is saved by Fang Shi Yu, a youth from Shaolin whose parents are also killed by the same villains. They learn and master the advanced Shaolin style kung fu, before Fang leads Hu and the Shaolin fellows to fight the enemies.

programme.title: Five Tough Guys
programme.desc: A titular gang of misfits come together to protect a patriotic general from a scheming usurper. To this end, the unlikely heroes act as the general’s escorts on a dangerous journey to a distant British consulate, beset by enemies and sinister Japanese interference along the way.

programme.title: Heaven Sword and Dragon Sabre
programme.desc: In the Yuan Dynasty, martial artists everywhere battle for the Heaven Sword and the Dragon Sabre, as only when these two powerful weapons combine can a secret be revealed to help one become the king of the martial arts world. As Zhang Wu Ji acquires the skills from “Nine Yang Scriptures” by chance, he is also embroiled in this lengthy battle.

programme.title: The Eight Diagram Pole Fighter
programme.desc: The Yang Generals were ambushed by the enemies and only two of the sons survived. The fifth son of Yang’s escapes to Shaolin temple and learns the pole-fighting techniques from the monks, eventually creating his own “Eight Diagram Pole Fight” and teaming up with the Shaolin monks to avenge his family.

programme.title: Cat vs Rat
programme.desc: Zhan and Bai are equally matched in martial arts skills. Bai saves the Emperor one day but did not believe in his identity and rejects a promotion. When Zhan is promoted to the royal guard after saving the Emperor, Bai gets angry and tries to prank him by stealing the imperial jade seal. Luckily, Zhan is able to retrieve the seal with his skills.

programme.title: My Country, My Parents
programme.desc: Set in 4 different eras in China, the 4-part anthology about ‘home and country’ is directed by Wu Jing, Zhang Zi Yi, Xu Zheng and Shen Teng, who also star in their own story. The movie depicts how the ‘fathers’ forge ahead through the struggle of times, defending strong family ties and passing on the ‘fighting’ spirit through generations.

programme.title: Fist of Legend
programme.desc: When Chen Zhen studies in Japan, he finds several Chinese students missing and accidentally uncovers the Black Dragon Society’s conspiracy. A new drug is invented to boost bodies of the Japanese troops in war and the Chinese students are used in their experiments. Chen Zhen vows to take down the evil society and destroy their secret laboratory.

programme.title: Disciples Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Yi is a skilled disciple of the Hong Quan style kung fu who work in a textile mill recommended by his senior, Han. Han warns Yi not to show off his martial arts skill so as to avoid getting into trouble. However, Yi does not listen and eventually gets dangerously involved in the conflict between two opposing textile mills.

programme.title: Ang Syota Kong Balikbayan
programme.desc: There is a budding romance between FPJ and Anjanette Abayari who has just returned home after living for years in the United States. But before a love triangle could be resolved there was the problem of a bag of diamonds hidden in the gasoline tank of FPJ's jeepney.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: This is the story of four women in the glamorous world of fashion, about their friendships, their loves, and their careers.

programme.title: Bad Boy (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: This was the landmark film that launched Robin Padilla to stardom as one of the biggest action stars in the Philippine cinema. Robin played a young man branded as "bad boy" for life because as a kid he killed his father in defense of his mother.

programme.title: Okey Si Ma'am
programme.desc: Keempee, Donna, Paco and Lander played high school senior students each having their own personal dilemmas. Ms. Sonia (Alice Dixson), with her unorthodox way of teaching became their counselor and friend who brought out the best in her students.

programme.title: Bukas Uulan Ng Bala
programme.desc: Elias (Dante Varona) goes home to his province for the town fiesta, expecting a festive reunion with his family. A tragedy awaits instead.

programme.title: Irosin, Pagputok Ng Araw... Babaha Ng Dugo
programme.desc: Anthony Alonzo portrays P/Capt. Antonio Dy, Station Commander of Irosin, Sorsogon. Dy is a recipient of the Medal of Valor from Pres. Cory Aquino for defending the municipal hall from armed NPA rebels.

programme.title: Paradise Inn
programme.desc: A story about the relationship between a mother and her daughter in a situation where everybody is a snake and with vested interest.

programme.title: Lagablab Sa Paraiso
programme.desc: A nurse and her cousin, a nightclub dancer, a honeymooning couple and two male prisoners. Survivors of a shipwreck, they are trapped together in an island. Of different backgrounds and personalities, can they set aside their differences to survive roughing it up in this island?

programme.title: Andrea, Paano Ba Ang Maging Isang Ina?
programme.desc: Two teachers find themselves on opposite sides in the fight for freedom. Nora Aunor is the woman who chose to join the rebels while her friend, Gina Alajar opted for a quiet life with her husband.

programme.title: Cara Y Cruz
programme.desc: Berting was an escaped convict. Boggart was a cab driver whom he took hostage when he bolted from jail. The two of them landed in a primitive island where all of the inhabitants were under the control of a religious cult.

programme.title: Oscar Ramos, Hitman
programme.desc: Oscar Ramos (Ramon Revilla) is a respected man in the community. He settles disputes and takes up the cudgels for the oppressed. He also has a secret -- an amulet that protects him from bullets. Will his amulet protect him when both the police and Ka Ernie's group hunt him down?

programme.title: Dogtag: Katarungan Sa Aking Kamay
programme.desc: Dante (Jestoni Alarcon) and Jojo (Emilio Garcia) consider themselves more than brothers because of shared experiences they had as a soldiers.

programme.title: Humanap Ng Panget (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Andrew E made his acting debut in this wacky comedy based on his big hit "Humanap Ka ng Panget". The message of the song is that if you want to be happy it is best to fall in love with an ugly woman or man who will be grateful for your love and will do anything you want.

programme.title: Design X Stories

programme.title: Face To Face
programme.desc: Yoshioka Sarasa revives ancient plant-based colors in Kyoto. As natural dyes grow scarce, she preserves their legacy while creating layered works that reveal new dimensions of nature's hues.

programme.title: Bosai: Science That Can Save Your Life

programme.title: The Unbreakable Silence
programme.desc: In July 2024, the Supreme Court ruled Japan's defunct Eugenic Protection Law as unconstitutional. We look into why many of the victims who were forcefully sterilized remain silent on their suffering.

programme.title: Magical Japanese
programme.desc: The Japanese language is rich in words and expressions influenced by nature, history, and culture. This episode looks at words related to bow and arrow. Explore the unique culture behind them.

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: At Roben Falls
programme.desc: We journey to a sacred mountain where pilgrims are purifying themselves in a waterfall before moving on. Some of them have even brought along offerings. And it turns out they have something to prove.

programme.desc: NHK WORLD-JAPAN presents a sumo highlights program for fans around the globe. Today the show features all top-division bouts from March 21, Day 14 of the Grand Sumo Tournament in Osaka.

programme.title: Sumopedia
programme.desc: Sumopedia enriches your sumo experience with information on the techniques, traditions and famous wrestlers of the past. The rules may be simple but there is a lot more to sumo than meets the eye.

programme.title: Herbal Symphony #1 Spring
programme.desc: In Uda, discover Japan's oldest private medicinal herb garden, where the natural landscape from 300 years ago is preserved in a botanical time capsule, a sanctuary of the local culture and history.

programme.title: Japanology Plus Mini
programme.desc: Octopuses have been part of the Japanese diet for centuries. Today, some people even keep them as pets. Octopus catches have been decreasing, but efforts to farm them on land are now underway.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View Of Japan
programme.desc: The seaside town of Hakodate has long flourished as a port. One savvy cat waits by a fisherman, hoping he'll share his catch! We meet more local cats at a fish market and a historic graveyard.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Anime Manga Explosion
programme.desc: The spotlight's on MAO, the latest from manga legend Takahashi Rumiko. Featuring handwritten comments from Takahashi, we go behind the scenes of the upcoming anime and the team bringing it to life.

programme.title: Texico
programme.desc: Learn the principles of programming without a computer. Animated characters provide fun and lucid explanations of 5 core processes: analysis, combination, generalization, abstraction, and simulation.

programme.title: I Love 'Mee'
programme.desc: Today is Mee's birthday. Everyone offers birthday wishes, but Mee wonders, "Why do we say 'Happy Birthday'?" So Papa decides to take Mee on a drive to retrace "The Story of Mee's Birth."

programme.title: NHK Newsline

programme.title: The World Heritage Sites In Japan
programme.desc: An astonishing 49 burial mounds of various shapes and sizes are scattered across Osaka. These 1,600-year-old mounds are the resting places of past rulers and elites. Research reveals new discoveries.

programme.title: Sumopedia

programme.title: Easy Japanese For Work

programme.desc: Chiba is known for peanuts. Area leather goods seller Iijima Satoshi uses discarded peanut skins from local farmers to make synthetic leather that's eco-friendly, durable and very versatile.

programme.title: Journey To The CentER Of The Earth
programme.desc: During a scientific expedition to Iceland, scientist Trevor Anderson (Fraser-- Crash, The Mummy), his nephew Sean (Josh Hutcherson) and their local guide, Hannah (Anita Briem), are trapped in a cave -- from which their only escape is to go deeper, into unimagined worlds, where the trio comes face to face with never-before-seen creatures and harrowing dangers as they race an building volcanic eruption to reach the surface!

programme.title: Godzilla
programme.desc: The world's most revered monster is reborn as visionary new director Gareth Edwards (Monsters) unleashes the epic action adventure GODZILLA. Starring an international ensemble cast led by Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Oscar nominee Ken Watanabe (The Last Samurai, Inception), Elizabeth Olsen, Oscar winner Juliette Binoche (The English Patient) and Oscar nominee Sally Hawkins (Blue Jasmine) with Oscar nominee David Strathairn (Good Night, and Good Luck.) and Breaking Bad's Bryan Cranston, GODZILLA is a powerful story of human courage and reconciliation in the face of titanic forces of nature -- when the awe-inspiring creature rises to restore balance as humanity stands defenseless. This spectacular adventure pits the world's most famous monster against malevolent creatures that, bolstered by humanity's scientific arrogance, threaten our very existence.

programme.title: Clash Of The Titans
programme.desc: In CLASH OF THE TITANS, the ultimate struggle for power pits men against kings and kings against gods. But the war between the gods themselves could destroy the world. Sam Worthington (Terminator Salvation, Avatar) stars as the Greek hero Perseus in this spectacular retelling of the classic myth (and '80s cult classic film). Born of a god, but raised as a man, Perseus is helpless to save his family from the clutches of Hades (Oscar nominee Ralph Fiennes -- Harry Potter films), the vengeful god of the underworld. With nothing left to lose, he volunteers to lead a dangerous mission to defeat Hades before he can seize power from Zeus (Oscar nominee Liam Neeson -- Batman Begins) and unleash hell on earth. With a daring band of warriors, Perseus sets off on a perilous journey deep into forbidden worlds. Battling unholy demons and fearsome beasts, he will triumph only if he can accept his power as a god, defy his fate and create his own destiny.

Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)

Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: Elsbeth (Season 3)
programme.desc: When “grief influencer” Raquel Drabowski’s presumed-dead husband makes a miraculous return, their reunion takes a fatal plunge. Meanwhile, Elsbeth’s surprise reunion with an old friend could expose a dangerous undercover operation.

programme.title: Sight Unseen (Season 2)
programme.desc: A quick stop for gas turns into a parent's worst nightmare when a 6 year old boy is snatched during a carjacking. Tess and Jake race against the clock to bring the child home alive as Sunny pours all her focus away from her trauma and into the case. When Tess and Jake track down the perp in a tense OJ style pursuit, Tess's empathy defuses a potentially deadly standoff, reuniting the boy safely with his family and prompting her to reflect on her own family history. Meanwhile, Sunny fights back intrusive thoughts with self-defense classes, and Matt seems to be ready to move on from Tess— but who is he dating…?

programme.title: The Rookie (Season 8)
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom
programme.desc: Owen and Claire return to the ruins of the Jurassic World theme park to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from a looming volcanic extinction.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (Season 14)
programme.desc: Danny and Gormley race to find Gus Vanderlip (Aidan Quinn), a committed detective who is dangerously determined to uncover how a rapist he arrested is back on the streets.

programme.title: Boston Blue (Season 1)
programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: NCSI: Origins (Season 2)
programme.desc: Season 2 of NCIS: Origins delves deeper into the unstoppable NCIS Camp Pendleton team led by the legendary Mike Franks, as well as Gibbs’ early career as a special agent, and reveals the fate of Lala after last season’s devastating car crash.

programme.title: Red Eye (Season 2)
programme.desc: While Hana investigates a murder at Heathrow, a threat is made against Delaney’s jet.

programme.desc: Playing cricket in the 80s Down Under was a tough assignment for visitors against a ruthless Australian team with a bruising fast bowling attack and players who attempted to psychologically destroy their opposition.

programme.title: Four Corners - Episode 5
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent - Episode 3
programme.desc: We are your passport to the world. Our stories, told through the ABC's network of foreign correspondents, will take you to incredible places where you'll meet the people and see the forces shaping our world.

programme.desc: The final word on the day's top stories, with the latest news and updated information from Australia's most trusted source of independent news. Presented by Mariam Saab.

programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year - Episode 3
programme.desc: Heat 3 features an array of unique talent, including the youngest and oldest artists in the competition. Celebrity sitters are Gardening Australia's Costa Georgiadis, comedian Celia Pacquola and actor Talijah Blackman-Corowa.

programme.title: Asia News Week - Episode 10
programme.desc: Yvonne Yong brings you a weekly roundup of the stories making news across the Asia region, plus what's trending on social media and making an impact on the culture and the way people live.

programme.title: Ride
programme.desc: Two world champions fall in love and conquer the world of BMX racing. A single training accident risks taking everything they have known away.

programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - Episode 7

programme.title: A Brief History Of Cricket Down Und - Evolution
programme.desc: The arrival of pay TV changes cricket. Innovate ideas in player development, the commercialisation of the game and the arrival of a group of once in a generation players level-ups the sport like never before.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast - Episode 24
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your Sunday. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Daniela Intili.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast - Episode 24
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your day. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Jared Coote.

programme.title: Insiders - Episode 9
programme.desc: David Speers and the panel discuss the outcome of the South Australian State Election. How have the Liberals and One Nation performed and what are the federal implications? Plus the week in politics as parliament returns.

programme.title: Offsiders - Women's Asian Cup Final Special
programme.desc: For 20 years, Offsiders has been here to unpack all the action, both on and off the field. Host Abbey Gelmi and the panel review the Women's Asian Cup Final plus all the latest NRL, AFL and Super Rugby news and action.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 5
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon - Episode 24
programme.desc: Melissa Mackay presents the latest from ABC News on the weekend bringing you today's top stories and coverage of events as they unfold. Plus original reporting, analysis and updated news, sport, weather and information.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Chips

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 2 - Port Adelaide v Essendon
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Common Cause - Coral Gardeners - PNG
programme.desc: As rising sea temperatures devastate coral reefs, a community in Papua New Guinea teams up with an Australian organisation - and the feisty village chicken - to restore fish stocks in their coastal waters.

programme.title: The Chef's Garden - Episode 4
programme.desc: Chef Massimo Mele pairs delicious Tongola goat curd with freshly-picked beetroot and vegetables. Then it's into the pure Tassie waters where Massimo samples some of the world's best oysters.

programme.title: On Country Kitchen - Episode 4
programme.desc: It's season 2 and Derek still can't cook! With locally found ingredients, and a sprinkle of culture and character, Mark and Derek create an Indigenous-inspired feast for the people they visit along their journey.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 81

programme.title: She is in Danger
programme.desc: After a fight with her boyfriend, Xue leaves home to stay in a remote B&B accommodation, together with a roommate Yi. One night, Xue accidentally discovers that Yi and another friend have killed Yi's ex-boyfriend, and is locked up by the duo so as to cover up the murder. Xue's buddy, Wen, comes seeking for her - can Xue and Wen escape from danger?

programme.title: Mama Ghost
programme.desc: In a coastal town, a forbidden romance sparks between Rico and Sisca, and their love unleashes a malevolent spirit. As chilling deaths plague the town, past secrets are being unraveled and the town is possessed by evil and fear. Rico must defy destiny and fight against the evil spirit to save his loved one.

programme.title: Never Leave
programme.desc: Strange incidents keep happening in Lin Yue's house after a car accident: her sister cannot see the images of her family members in the mirror; her father is peeping at night; and there is the sound of marbles from the attic every day at dawn. Following the sound to the attic, Lin Yue finds her own death portrait as she opens the door...

programme.title: Chop Chop
programme.desc: A young couple's tranquility is shattered by a psychotic serial killer one quiet evening. Their battle for survival reveals hidden truths, entangling them unwittingly with the criminal underworld.

programme.title: The Revenge
programme.desc: Ruo Wei returns to her childhood home with two best friends, and reunites with her cousin who has always lived there. While they plan to enjoy their trip, they are constantly haunted by paranormal events, ending up in a terrifying experience with unexpected outcome.

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Detective Dee: The Ghosts in Weird Town
programme.desc: Detective Dee investigates a series of terrifying vampire transformations in Youming Town, uncovering a sinister conspiracy masterminded by Prince Li Zhen, who plots to overthrow the empire. Armed with courage and ingenuity, Dee defeats the bloodthirsty vampires and ultimately exposes the prince’s dark ambitions.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jing Wen, a struggling drama student, takes on a modelling job to help cover her tuition costs. As she becomes a model for an enigmatic artist specializing in expressive human body sketches, Jing Wen accidentally uncovers a shocking truth, plunging her into a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Si Nan and her husband travel to Kuala Lumpur for a vacation to relieve her pregnancy stress. However, she soon uncovers his evil plan to turn their child into a 'Luk Krok' for profit, which puts her in grave danger. With the help of the hotel ghosts, she manages to flee and alert the police to arrest him, finally giving birth to her child.

programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: Rooftop
programme.desc: A group of friends invites Paul to a secret party on their campus rooftop. When a prank accidentally kills Paul, the friends cover up the incident and promised never to disclose it. Paul vows to take revenge by becoming a vicious ghost to haunt them into taking responsibility for their actions.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: When beloved matriarch Sherry Black, 64, is murdered in her rare books store in Salt Lake City, investigators suspect theft as the motive.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When jewellery seller Minerva Cantu, 26, is found bound, gagged and lifeless in her home, police suspect robbery as the motive.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2)
programme.desc: A young woman that aspires to be an FBI agent is brought in after trying to run her boyfriend over with her car, while a male exotic dancer finds himself back in jail due to a previous DUI charge.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Lakhvir Singh enjoyed cooking for Lucky Cheema, the man she loved. But when he left her to marry a much younger woman, Singh made the couple a meal that would turn out to be the last Lucky ever tasted.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A convicted felon shows the judge his gunshot wounds; a judge can't stop laughing at a defendant's inability to parallel park; a convicted killer must face a judge known as 'Scary Mary'; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A convicted felon drops the f-bomb during a virtual hearing; a grieving mother brings her son's ashes to his killer's sentencing; and more.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: In Mobile, a professor is murdered in his own home. It takes a missing gaming console and a strategic game of cat and mouse with the suspects for detectives and prosecutors to get justice.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: After a violent melee leaves two young men brutally gunned down, Mobile detectives have to track down multiple suspects to piece together what happened.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6)
programme.desc: A young father and his family come under attack at a busy drive-thru. Terrified of his aggravated assailant, he fires his gun and allegedly injures an innocent bystander.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: A young man who came to the U.S. to fulfil his dreams is killed at a birthday party, and Tulsa police must cut through a web of lies to find the culprit.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson
programme.desc: After Nicole’s murder, OJ's behaviour grows increasingly erratic and bizarre. Placed squarely in the LAPD's crosshairs as the prime suspect, he leads them on a slow-speed chase down the 405.

programme.title: Preschool | Eccd
programme.desc: Learn about the natural and physical environment and one’s culture and heritage

programme.title: Kindergarten
programme.desc: Learn about the concept of size, length, weight, time, and money. Study how children can take care of themselves and understand the objects in the environment and their attributes.

programme.title: Grade 1 Language
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang konsepto ng pagbabaybay, panghalip, pangngalan, salitang naglalarawan, at ang pagtukoy ng sariling ideya at opinyon tungkol sa napakinggang kuwento.

programme.title: Grade 1 Math
programme.desc: Know more about fractions 1⁄2 and 1/4, 2-dimensional and 3-dimensional figures, as well as continuous and repeating patterns and mathematical sentences.

programme.title: Grade 1 Reading & Literacy
programme.desc: Learn about polite expressions and how to talk about oneself, one’s family and one’s personal experiences.

programme.title: Grade 1 Makabansa
programme.desc: Unawain ang kahalagahan ng pagkilala ng mga batayang impormasyon ng pisikal na kapaligiran sa sariling paaralan at ng mga taong bumubuo rito para sa paghubog ng kakayahan ng bawat mag-aaral.

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, salitang magkatugma, salitang naglalarawan, at pagbabaybay, pati na rin ang iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento at ang pag-uugnay ng sarili sa tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang kahalagahan ng mabuting paglilingkod ng mga namumuno sa pagsulong ng mga pangunahing hanapbuhay at pagtugon sa pangangailangan ng mga kasapi ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang tambalang salita, pandiwa, pang-abay, at pang-ukol. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng sariling ideya, hinuha, pangunahin at sumusuportang kaisipan, tungkol sa kuwentong napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Discover how objects perform motion, and learn about the source of light, sound, heat and electricity, along with their uses.

programme.title: Grade 8 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano magsuri at maghambing ng iba't ibang uri ng panitikan, kung ano ang mga estratehiya sa pagkuha ng impormasyon, paano wastong gamitin ang impormal na komunikasyon, at ang angkop na ekspresyon sa pagbabahagi ng ideya o opinyon tungkol sa mga tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 8 Math
programme.desc: Identify the key concepts of axiomatic structure of geometry and triangle congruence.

programme.title: Grade 8 English
programme.desc: Examine what are biases, propagandas, parallelism, and cohesive devices in different types of speech.

programme.title: Grade 8 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Aralin ang naging transpormasyon tungo sa makabagong panahon ng mga bansa at rehiyon sa daigdig bunsod ng paglaganap ng mga kaisipan sa agham, politika, at ekonomiya tungo sa pagbuo ng pandaigdigan kamalayan.

programme.title: Grade 8 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about the particle nature of matter as a basis for explaining properties, physical changes, and structure of substances and mixtures. Discover how to identify a substance according to its atomic structure, and how to use the periodic table of elements to organize and determine the chemical properties of elements.

programme.title: PTA
programme.desc: Parent-Teacher Activity Time A helpful guide for parents and teachers, this program features essential topics to better support children in the distance learning setup.

programme.title: Grade 4 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano wastong gamitin ang mga pang-abay, pang-uri, pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang naglalarawan. Aralin kung paano magsulat ng pangungusap, talata, at balita, at kung paano magsuri ng mga kuwento at mga pahayag.

programme.title: Grade 4 Math
programme.desc: Learn about parallel and perpendicular lines, angles, triangles, quadrilaterals, continuous and repeating patterns and number sentences, and the concept of time, perimeter, area, and volume.

programme.title: Grade 4 English
programme.desc: Learn what are adverbs, signal words, and graphic organizers, and how to analyze a story and infer the speaker's tone, mood and purpose.

programme.title: Grade 4 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain ang bahaging ginagampanan ng pamahalaan sa lipunan, mga pinuno at iba pang naglilingkod sa pagkakaisa, kaayusan at kaunlaran ng bansa.

programme.title: Grade 4 Science
programme.desc: Know more about forces that change the shape, size or movement of objects and how light, heat and sound travel using various media.
